name: io.github.Servosity/liongard-mcp
title: Liongard MCP
description: Liongard config visibility: sync your estate offline, then drift-check and search it from one CLI.

environmentVariables.name: LIONGARD_INSTANCE
environmentVariables.description: Your Liongard subdomain (the 'acme' in acme.app.liongard.com); builds the API URL.

environmentVariables.name: LIONGARD_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Base64 X-ROAR-API-KEY for the Liongard API (or use LIONGARD_ACCESS_KEY_ID + LIONGARD_ACCESS_KEY_SECRET).
